tasks_completed.description: Updated provenance filter steps 4 and 5 in agents/changelog-analyst.md to split BULK=false (warn-and-skip from candidate set) vs BULK=true (enrichment-only, staging authority is git status) behavior for provenance_anomaly files
tasks_completed.changes: Lines 173-174 replaced with BULK-mode-aware behavior: BULK=false removes anomalous files from staging candidate set with WARNING; BULK=true retains enrichment-only behavior. Step 5 log messages updated to be BULK-mode-specific with distinct warn-and-skip vs enrichment suffixes.
tasks_completed.rationale: Design gap: step 4 previously said 'Stage them if they appear in the candidate set' for BULK=false, allowing phantom files in dev.files_modified to bypass provenance check and get staged. Warn-and-skip in BULK=false closes this escape hatch.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — design gap, not a regression
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Provenance filter was designed to block anomalous paths from influencing commit-message enrichment but the stronger property (don't stage them in BULK=false) was not carried through
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Explicitly splits BULK=false (exclude from staging) vs BULK=true (enrichment-only) in step 4, with matching BULK-mode-aware warning messages in step 5

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) line ~173 contains 'BULK=false', 'warn-and-skip', 'candidate set'; (2) line ~175 contains 'BULK=true', 'git status', 'enrichment-only'; (3) guard at lines 182-184 ('ONLY as a provenance sanity check', 'NEVER an independent inclusion source') is unchanged; (4) steps 1-3 at lines 171-172 are unchanged.

self_verification.notes: Read-back of lines 173-184 confirms: (1) 'BULK=false' + 'warn-and-skip' + 'candidate set' present at line 174; (2) 'BULK=true' + 'git status' + 'enrichment-only' present at line 175; (3) guard lines 182-184 unchanged; (4) steps 1-3 at lines 171-172 unchanged.
